# Repository Instructions

This repository uses [docs/implementation-plan.md](../docs/implementation-plan.md) as the canonical implementation roadmap.

When working in this repository:

- Review [docs/implementation-plan.md](../docs/implementation-plan.md) before starting substantial feature work.
- Keep [docs/implementation-plan.md](../docs/implementation-plan.md) synchronized with the GitHub issue roadmap and the actual state of implementation.
- If you complete work tied to an issue, update the implementation plan when scope, execution order, status, dependencies, or follow-up tasks changed.
- If you close or resolve an issue, check whether [docs/implementation-plan.md](../docs/implementation-plan.md) needs to reflect that completion, any newly discovered work, or any sequencing change.
- If implementation diverges from the plan, update the plan in the same change whenever practical.
